AdminSessionAuth.description: Admin session cookie issued by POST /api/v1/admin/auth/session.
AdminSessionAuth.name: bidanapp_admin_session

ViewerSessionAuth.description: Viewer session cookie issued by POST /api/v1/auth/login or POST /api/v1/auth/register.
ViewerSessionAuth.name: bidanapp_viewer_session

info.description: Backend-generated OpenAPI contract for the marketplace runtime.
info.title: bidanapp-backend

get.description: WebSocket handshake endpoint for live chat. The HTTP handshake is documented here; realtime event payloads are defined in the SDK package and project docs.

parameters.description: Chat thread identifier. Defaults to default-thread when omitted.
parameters.name: thread_id

parameters.description: Unique client identifier. Defaults to web-client when omitted.
parameters.name: client_id

parameters.description: Display name used as the sender fallback for outbound messages.
parameters.name: sender

403.description: Origin is not authorized for this WebSocket endpoint.

get.summary: Upgrade chat connection to WebSocket
